name: Individual Pecan Pies
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix together the flour, icing sugar, water, and 4 oz of melted butter in a bowl until well combined.
2. Divide the mixture between 6 flan tins or small bun tins and press the edges up.
3. Prick the centers lightly with a fork to prevent excessive rise during baking.
4. Place on a baking tray and blind bake in a preheated oven at 190°C/375°F/gas mark 5 for 10-15 minutes, until golden brown.
5. Remove from the oven and divide the chopped pecans evenly among the pastry cases.
6. Whisk the eggs, then stir in the sugar, syrup, and remaining 1 oz melted butter until well combined.
7. Beat the mixture and spoon it into the pastry cases, filling almost to the top.
8. Return to the oven for 25-30 minutes, or until set and golden.
9. Serve hot or cold with cream, creme fraiche, or ice cream.
Time: about an hour and a quarter for one batch.
